meta.title: AI Exposure of the Canadian Job Market
meta.exposure_metric_scale: 0-10 display score derived from the share of workers in high-exposure EPIAC occupations
meta.exposure_note: Official exposure fields come from StatCan's 2024 EPIAC study based on the 2021 Census and are mapped to the current NOC 2021 occupation groups used in this dashboard.
meta.source: Statistics Canada annual occupation tables with StatCan EPIAC study mapping

source_tables.name: 14-10-0416-01 Labour force characteristics by occupation, annual
Experimental Estimates of Potential Artificial Intelligence Occupational Exposure in Canada, 2024

research_sources.name: StatCan: Employment growth in Canada since the beginning of the generative AI era
StatCan: Croissance de l'emploi au Canada depuis le debut de l'ere de l'IA generative
ISQ: Exposition des professions a l'intelligence artificielle en 2024
